body_txt: The Moon. Our planet's only natural companion, the brightest object in the night sky; worshipped as a deity by countless cultures; inspiration of poets, lovers, lunatics, and werewolves . Depictions of the moon in fiction vary, and it can behave rather ... oddly.    Subtropes For more moon tropes, see Index on the Moon . For more on eclipses, see Total Eclipse of the Plot . When the moon alters others comedically, see Moonburn . See also Weird Sun , The Stars Are Going Out , Alien Sky , and Frequently Full Moon .
